scripts.build: npm --prefix packages/core run build && npm --prefix apps/web run build && npm --prefix apps/mobile run build && npm --prefix services/api run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix packages/core run lint && npm --prefix apps/web run lint && npm --prefix apps/mobile run lint && npm --prefix services/api run lint
scripts.test: npm --prefix packages/core run test && npm --prefix apps/web run test && npm --prefix apps/mobile run test && npm --prefix services/api run test
